title: Generation of SARS-COV-2 RNA Transcript Standards for qRT-PCR Detection Assays
author: Chantal Vogels
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdv6i69e
materials: Many different cDNA synthesis kits can be used, but choose something that is relatively high-fidelity. The current protocol uses SuperScript IV VILO Master Mix because the enzyme has low error rates and the protocol is fast and easy. SuperScript™ IV VILO™ Master Mix Thermo Fisher Catalog #11756500 %s %s
Discard supernatant without disturbing the beads.

Quantify the DNA concentration using the Qubit High Sensitivity DNA kit (or equivalent) from 1 µL of each product, following manufacturer's protocol. Qubit™ dsDNA HS Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Catalog #Q32851

Important: thaw reagents on ice, but keep the 10X reaction buffer at room temperature while assembling the reaction. Add the 10X reaction buffer after water and NTPs have been added to the tube. MEGAscript™ T7 Transcription Kit Thermo Fisher Catalog #AM1334
Quantify the RNA concentration using the Qubit High Sensitivity RNA kit from 1 µL of each product, following manufacturer's protocol. Qubit™ RNA HS Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Catalog #Q32852

steps.title: Isolate viral RNA using Omega Viral...
steps.instruction: Isolate viral RNA using Omega Viral DNA/RNA kit, Trizol, or equivalent.

steps.title: Run the following cycles on a thermocycler
steps.instruction: Run the following cycles on a thermocycler: %s %s

steps.title: Store samples at 4 °C, (same...
steps.instruction: Store samples at 4 °C, (same day) or -20 °C, (up to a week) until ready for PCR.

steps.title: Prepare the following primers at a...
steps.instruction: Prepare the following primers at a concentration of 10 µM, depending on which assay is needed. The nucleocapsid (N) transcript is for the US CDC-N1, N2, and N3 (N3 is not currently in use), HKU-N, and China CDC-N assays. The envelope (E) transcript is for use with the Berlin-E assay, nsp14 transcript is for use with the HKU-ORF1 assay, the RdRp transcript is for use with the Berlin RdRp assay (low sensitivity), and the nsp10 transcript is for use with the China CDC-ORF1 assay. See here for assay primer sequences and references . %s %s

steps.title: Prepare the following PCR reaction for each sample
steps.instruction: Prepare the following PCR reaction for each sample: Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0492S %s %s

steps.title: Run the following cycles on a thermocycler
steps.instruction: Run the following cycles on a thermocycler: %s %s

steps.title: Allow Mag-Bind TotalPure NGS beads to...
steps.instruction: Allow Mag-Bind TotalPure NGS beads to equilibrate to room temperature, vortex until homogenous. Mag-Bind® TotalPure NGS Omega Biotek Catalog #M1378-01

steps.title: Bring PCR product volume up to...
steps.instruction: Bring PCR product volume up to 25 µL with water (if not at volume already).

steps.title: Add 20 µL of beads to...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of beads to 25 µL of PCR product, mix well, and incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes. If your lab has a KingFisher extractor to use for post-PCR cleanup steps, our automated protocols are available here: https://github.com/grubaughlab/Kingfisher_protocols (use ‘purification.bdz’ for this cleanup)

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic stand...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic stand and incubate until solution appears clear.

steps.title: While tubes are on the magnet,...
steps.instruction: While tubes are on the magnet, add 200 µL of 80% ethanol, incubate for 30 seconds, and discard the ethanol wash.

steps.title: Repeat previous 80% ethanol wash and...
steps.instruction: Repeat previous 80% ethanol wash and remove as much ethanol as possible.

steps.title: Leave tubes on magnet and air dry for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Leave tubes on magnet and air dry for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove tubes from magnet and add...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from magnet and add 20 µL of nuclease-free water. Mix well by pipetting.

steps.title: Place tubes on magnet stand
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnet stand. When solution appears clear, remove supernatant without disturbing the beads and place into new tubes.

steps.title: Check DNA fragment distributions of the...
steps.instruction: Check DNA fragment distributions of the samples using the BioAnalyzer DNA 1000 kit, following manufacturer's protocol. Agilent High Sensitivity DNA Kit Agilent Technologies Catalog #5067-4626

steps.title: Mix equal volumes (2 µL/sample) of...
steps.instruction: Mix equal volumes (2 µL/sample) of the four ribonucleotide solutions together and add 8 µL of the mixture for each sample.

steps.title: Use 2 µL of pTRI-Xef in...
steps.instruction: Use 2 µL of pTRI-Xef in a standard reaction as a transcription control. This should yield a transcript of 1.89 kb. %s %s

steps.title: Mix by pipetting up and down...
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting up and down and microfuge briefly to collect reaction mixture at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C, for 4 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C, for 4 hours .

steps.title: Add 1 µL of TURBO DNase,...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of TURBO DNase, mix well and incubate 37 °C, for 15 minutes .

steps.title: Add the following components to a 1
steps.instruction: Add the following components to a 1.5 mL tube. %s %s

steps.title: Mix and chill at -20 °C, for >30 minutes
steps.instruction: Mix and chill at -20 °C, for >30 minutes .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C, for 15...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C, for 15 minutes at maximum speed to pellet the RNA.

steps.title: Carefully remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully remove supernatant. Wash pellet with 1 mL of 70% ethanol and re-centrifuge at 4 °C, for 15 minutes at maximum speed to maximize removal of unincorporated nucleotides.

steps.title: Carefully remove the ethanol and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the ethanol and resuspend in 20 µL of nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Check RNA fragment distributions of the...
steps.instruction: Check RNA fragment distributions of the samples using the BioAnalyzer RNA 6000 pico kit, following manufacturer's protocol. Bioanalyzer RNA 6000 Nano Kit Agilent Technologies Catalog #5067

steps.title: Use the following RNA copy number...
steps.instruction: Use the following RNA copy number calculator to calculate genome equivalents per uL and prepare standards.
